name: jupyter-link
description: Execute code in Jupyter kernels and persist outputs to notebooks. Supports real-time collaboration (RTC) when jupyter-collaboration is installed

config_set.description: Save Jupyter connection settings (url, token, port) to persistent config file

config_get.description: Show effective configuration with source (env/file/default) for each field

check_env.description: Verify connectivity and basic Jupyter Server compatibility

list_sessions.description: List sessions and optionally filter by path or name

read_notebook.description: Read a notebook JSON via Contents API

write_notebook.description: Write notebook JSON via Contents API

read_cell.description: Read specific cells with source, outputs, and metadata. Supports single cell, list, range, or full summary. Accepts room_ref for RTC path

insert_cell.description: Insert a code cell with agent metadata. Accepts room_ref for real-time collaboration via Y.Doc

update_cell.description: Update a code cell (source/outputs/execution_count/metadata). Accepts room_ref for real-time collaboration via Y.Doc

open_kernel_channels.description: Open persistent kernel WS channels and return a channel_ref. Pass rtc:true to also connect an RTC room (returns room_ref). Auto-creates session if none exists

execute_code.description: Send execute_request on an open channel and return parent_msg_id

collect_outputs.description: Wait for outputs/reply/idle for a parent_msg_id on a channel

close_channels.description: Close a previously opened channel_ref. Accepts room_ref to also disconnect the RTC room

save_notebook.description: Save notebook (round-trip PUT). No-op when using RTC (server auto-saves)

create_notebook.description: Create a new empty notebook via Contents API. Idempotent (returns existing if found). Accepts kernel_name, language, display_name

create_session.description: Create a Jupyter session (start kernel) for a notebook. Idempotent (returns existing session if found)

run_cell.description: Insert, execute, and collect outputs for a cell in one compound command. With room_ref, outputs stream live to JupyterLab during execution

test_api.description: Validate Jupyter Server REST API compatibility using the official OpenAPI schema
